name: iccdev
description: ICC color profile libraries and tools (RefIccMAX / iccDEV)

json.description: Build IccJSON2 JSON serialization library and JSON conversion tools when tools are enabled

tools.description: Build core CLI tools (iccDumpProfile, iccRoundTrip, iccApplyNamedCmm, etc.)

xml.description: Build IccXML2 XML serialization library and iccFromXml/iccToXml tools
